hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Interview me to find the goal for this change and the acceptance criteria. The baseline acceptance criteria is pre-commit and github test workflows passing."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Do not run mypy directly. Run validation through the project pre-commit configuration instead, e.g. pre-commit run mypy (mypy is just an example, the same applies to any hook). All pre-commit hooks must pass, but mypy and any-hook are the most problematic: mypy errors must never be ignored or suppressed, and Any is forbidden."}}'
